title: Formula column in gantt widget

posts.author: mattia.camponesco (Mattia Camponesco)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear all, in our organization with we have set up a dropdown column called “Portfolio” used to group all the projects referring to a particular portfolio. There are some cases in which there’s no portfolio, so we have put the default value “No Portfolio”. In order to always separate these projects without portfolio, we have created an addition formula column that uses “Portfolio” values if exists or “Area” (status column) value if the “Portfolio” value is “No Portfolio”. Then we wanted to use this formula column as a group by column in a gantt widget but at the moment is not possibile. I think would be very useful to be able to use every column types inside the widgets.
